description: An absolutely high profile Basketball sneaker, the nike Air Afterburner Flight is a rage among basketball players since the 1990s. Replete with responsive cushioning and a comfort Fit which is nearly true to size, this shoe is sure to get you those winning points.Upper Meshed upper for maximum breathability Perforated synthetic overlays to provide structure to the shoe and midfoot support and ventilation nike swoosh in synthetic leather with embroidered outline for added support and style Asymmetrical lace-up system for snug fit Synthetic laces for durability Meshed and padded tongue for ample ventilation and comfort Cushioned sockliner for in-step comfort and snug fit Midsole Plush phylon midsole for responsive cushioning and durability Cushioned footbed for ample comfort and protection from impact PU midsole for enhanced shock absorption Outsole Durable rubber outsole in waffle pattern for maximum grip, traction and durability Flex grooves for comfortable movement of foot Ergonomic design to support the inner arch of foot Nike Air heel for added cushioning and impact protection Wash careDo not machine washRemove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
